problems.title: Trapping Rain Water
problems.description: Given n non-negative integers representing an elevation map where the width of each bar is 1, compute how much water it can trap after raining.

examples.title: Example 1
examples.explanation: 6 units of rain water are trapped.

examples.title: Example 2
examples.explanation: 9 units of rain water are trapped.

problems.title: Remove Element
problems.description: Given an integer array nums and an integer val, remove all occurrences of val in nums in-place and return the number of elements not equal to val.

examples.title: Example 1
examples.explanation: The first two elements of nums become 2 and 2.

examples.title: Example 2
examples.explanation: The first five elements can be any ordering of 0, 0, 1, 3, and 4.

problems.title: Palindrome Number
problems.description: Given an integer x, return true if x is a palindrome, and false otherwise.

examples.title: Example 1
examples.explanation: 121 reads the same from left to right and right to left.
